Stop Guessing.

Start Passing.

Bar Ready LV helps bars and restaurants in Las Vegas stay ahead of health and safety requirements through professional Mock Health and Safety Inspections — so you never have to worry about what a real inspector might find.

Book an Inspection See How It Works
The Stakes

One Bad Inspection Can Close Your Bar Overnight.

We help you find the problems before the inspector does.

Risk #1
Surprise Closure
One failed inspection can shut your doors — sometimes for days. That's lost revenue, lost staff trust, and a very public mark on your business.
Days
Average closure duration
$0
Revenue while closed
Risk #2
Your Reputation on Yelp
A bad public health score doesn't stay private. Customers check ratings before choosing where to go. A failed inspection sends them to your competitors.
Public
Scores are visible to all
Lost
Customer traffic drops fast
Risk #3
Fines Add Up Fast
Health code violations come with financial penalties that stack quickly — on top of the operational chaos of a real inspection gone wrong.
Stack
Fines per each violation
Fast
Can accrue in one visit
★ ★ ★
♦ ♦ ♦

You Find Bar Ready LV
